conditions.condition: runnable prototype is not Markdown-only or JSON-only
conditions.evidence: The proposal requires index.html, manifest.json, runbook.md, localhost serving, HTTP 200, and expected content checks.
activation_target.provider_kind is local_tool and scope_out forbids real provider calls, live auto_router, and subscription CLI daemonization.
minimum_validation requires localhost HTTP server validation and evidence report with artifact refs and digests.

conditions.condition: L2 SaaS and production scope remains forbidden
conditions.evidence: scope_out forbids accounts, auth, payment, billing, multitenancy, compliance, external repo mutation, deploy, PR, and production side effects.

recommendation: Gate M passes. Implement only the local_tool L1 prototype pipeline and review it through Gate N before any real provider or deploy activation.
